posts.author: Shree_Balaji_Sampath
posts.text: I was analysing Subex and it seems to be at a transition point. Turnaround Thesis: What Subex Was (Past) Legacy telecom analytics company (Revenue Assurance + Fraud) Slow growth, heavy services model Complex, long implementation cycles Revenue stagnation for ~10 years (~₹300–350 Cr range) Stock collapsed ~90–99% from peak → complete loss of market trust What Has Changed (Present) Business Reset Exited non-core businesses → focus back on telecom core Cost discipline improved → profitability turned positive Cash position improved → no survival risk > This is a clean base for turnaround Product T…
